text: The board may adopt rules for the administration of this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.002 — Rules

The board may adopt rules for the administration of this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 76, Sec. 4, eff. May 14, 2001.*

subsections.text: The board may adopt rules for the administration of this chapter.
